ius.name: Dashboard Page
ius.description: A single-page web dashboard for managing tasks with Catppuccin Mocha styling. Includes localStorage persistence, inline edit panels, task creation, deletion, bulk operations, and compact status bar.

contract.description: Complete HTML dashboard with inline CSS and JavaScript for task management

outputs.name: renderHTML
outputs.description: Complete HTML page with embedded CSS and JavaScript

invariants: Title validation: form rejects empty titles before submission
Catppuccin Mocha only: no theme toggle or light mode
Responsive layout: single column mobile, multi-column desktop
Overdue tasks show red border and OVERDUE indicator
localStorage persistence: tasks survive page refreshes
Inline edit panels: no modal dialogs for editing
Client-side view switching: no page reload between active/archived

ius.name: Analytics Panel
ius.description: Statistics calculation and compact status bar display for task dashboard. Computes completion rates, overdue counts, and renders inline status bar with metrics.

contract.description: Analytics calculation and compact status bar generation

outputs.name: renderStatusBar
outputs.description: HTML for compact inline status bar with metrics

invariants: Completion rate is calculated as (completed / total) * 100
Overdue tasks exclude completed and archived tasks
Status bar is compact, centered, and fit-content width

ius.name: Task List Display
ius.description: Task list rendering component with filtering and status transitions. Handles task card display, status change callbacks, and filtered views.

contract.description: Task list component with filtering and status management

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Callbacks for status changes and task clicks

invariants: Task cards always show title, priority badge, and status
Filtering respects status, priority, and assignee criteria

ius.name: Styles
ius.description: Style configuration system with Catppuccin Mocha color palette for the Task Dashboard

contract.description: Style configuration and CSS generation for Catppuccin Mocha theme

outputs.name: generateCSS
outputs.description: Generated CSS with CSS custom properties

invariants: CSS custom properties use --ctp-* prefix for all Catppuccin colors
Semantic mappings link to Catppuccin variables (--primary: var(--ctp-blue))
Default config uses Catppuccin Mocha palette exclusively
